name: Charlie Daniels Parkway
description: Charlie Daniels Parkway is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mount Juliet, TN. There are 4 hard and wood courts. 2 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: College Hills
description: Come play pickleball at College Hills in West End Heights, TN!

name: Jimmy Floyd Family Center
description: Come play pickleball at Jimmy Floyd Family Center in Lebanon, TN! There are 6 concrete courts. 2 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Mt. Juliet Community Center
description: Mt. Juliet Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mt. Juliet, TN. There are 4 courts. 2 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Mundy Park Pickleball Courts
description: Mundy Park Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Mt. Juliet, TN. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Sgt. Jerry Mundy Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Sgt. Jerry Mundy Memorial Park in Mount Juliet, TN! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Sports Village Fitness
description: Sports Village Fitness is a place to play pickleball in Lebanon, TN. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, food, wheelchair accessibility, and trainers or lessons. Reservations are available.
fees: Members only — Must join sports village fitness club

name: The Club at Lake Providence
description: Come play pickleball at The Club at Lake Providence in Mount Juliet, TN! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. A membership is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved.
